case_title: AARON SLODOWITZ ET AL VS. JOE ARMEL ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SLODOWITZ, AARON AS TO DEFENDANT MIRONOVA, TATYANA
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF SLODOWITZ, AARON
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $120. SERVED DEC-28-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ARMEL, JOE

ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM DENIED*** PER PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. REASON: EACH INDIVIDUAL SEEKING A ZOOM APPEARANCE MUST SEPARATELY SUBMIT A REQUEST, DETAILING THE REASON FOR THE REQUEST.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,000.00 FILED BY SLODOWITZ, AARON WOOD, ROBERT JACKSON, JOHN MASICH, WILL AS TO DEFENDANT ARMEL, JOE MIRONOVA, TATYANA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-13-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF SLODOWITZ, AARON

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-13-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-13-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF AARON SLODOWITZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOE ARMEL IS NOT PRESENT. TATYANA MIRONOVA IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-13-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SLODOWITZ, AARON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARMEL, JOE MIRONOVA, TATYANA $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $445.80 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,445.80 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
